common.loadingError: Loading error. Make sure the API is running.
common.name: Name

describe.title: Describe your delivery
describe.body: Where the package starts, where it arrives, what it contains. Pin the map so the driver finds it on the first try.

assign.title: A driver takes it on
assign.body: Air Mess automatically finds a nearby driver. You get a pickup code and a delivery code — give each one only to the right person.

track.title: Track in real time
track.body: You receive a tracking link to share with the recipient. Watch the driver on the map all the way to the drop-off.

origin.title: The pickup address
origin.body: This is where the driver picks up the package. Make sure the pin on the map is accurate.

urgency.title: Standard or Express
urgency.body: Standard = base rate, regular handling. Express = dedicated driver, faster, a bit pricier.

collection.title: Cash-on-delivery
collection.body: Tick this if the driver has to collect money from the recipient — in cash, mobile money, or already prepaid.

declared.title: Package value (insurance)
declared.body: If the package is lost or stolen, this is the amount Air Mess refunds you. Be honest: under-declaring means less refund.

login.title: Welcome back.
login.subtitle: Sign in to your merchant workspace.

sidePanel.subtext: Follow every delivery live, collect payments automatically, withdraw funds whenever you want.

register.title: Create an account.
register.subtitle: Join Air Mess in under 2 minutes.

sidePanel.benefit1Body: No onboarding fees. You only pay for the deliveries you make.
sidePanel.benefit2Body: A sales rep reviews your application and activates your account the same day.
sidePanel.benefit3Body: Every courier is identified, trained, and rated by merchants.

forgot.title: Forgot password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email — we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgot.submittedBody: If this email is linked to an Air Mess account, a reset link has been sent. Check your inbox (and spam folder).

reset.title: New password
reset.subtitleSuffix: . Choose a strong new password (8 characters minimum).
reset.invalidBody: This reset link is incomplete or corrupted.

dashboard.pendingBody: Your merchant account is being validated by an administrator (within 24 hours). You'll be notified once it's active.

courses.subtitle: Full filterable history. Click on a delivery to see details.
courses.adjustSearch: Adjust your search or change the filter.

detail.title: Delivery details
detail.cancelPostPickupTitle: The package is already with the courier
detail.cancelPostPickupBody: By cancelling now, the courier will bring the package back to you. You will be charged for the leg already done (up to {{fee}} FCFA). Ops will finalize the exact billing after the return.
detail.cancelPostPickupAck: I understand I will be charged for the completed leg.

new.title: Create a
new.subtitle: Fill in the details below, a courier is assigned automatically.
new.collectionCheckbox: The courier must collect an amount
new.quotaMonthlyReached: Monthly quota reached ({{used}}/{{limit}}). Upgrade your plan to continue.
new.originPositionMissing: Origin position missing. Click on the origin map to set it.
new.destinationPositionMissing: Destination position missing. Click on the destination map to set it.
new.walletInsufficientBody: will be paid via direct Fedapay payment at creation.
new.quotaReachedBody: This delivery will be debited from your wallet if the balance allows, otherwise via direct Fedapay payment.
new.originSectionDesc: Where the package leaves from (pre-filled from your profile)
new.geoSuccess: ✓ Position detected automatically. You can adjust it above.
new.geoDenied: Auto geolocation denied — use "My current position" or click on the map.
new.destinationSectionDesc: To whom and where to deliver
new.mapClickHint: Click on the map to position.
new.collectionSectionDesc: Does the courier need to collect money?
new.collectionModalBody: You didn't specify whether the courier should collect an amount on delivery. Would you like to enable collection?
new.declaredValueHelper: Used as reimbursement in case of theft or loss. Optional for low-cost items (documents, small objects).
new.declaredValueSuggestion: You're collecting a significant amount. Declare the package value to be reimbursed if the courier steals or loses it — without a declared value, you can only recover the collection amount.
new.premiumHint: This delivery exceeds the retail threshold ({{threshold}} FCFA). Our team will take charge and call you back to assign a dedicated courier.

addresses.subtitle: Reuse your frequent addresses to create a delivery in two clicks.
addresses.subtitleReuse: Save time: store your frequent recipients to reuse them in a click.
addresses.emptyBody: Create your first address to reuse on your next deliveries.
addresses.label: Label
addresses.confirmDeleteBody: This action is permanent. Existing deliveries are not affected.

wallet.subtitle: Top up your wallet to pay for deliveries automatically. Not enough balance? The delivery falls back to direct payment.
wallet.lowBalanceBody: Your balance is below the recommended minimum ({{amount}}). Top up now to avoid direct payments on every delivery.
wallet.historyEmpty: No transaction yet. Top up your wallet to get started.
wallet.minTopUpError: The minimum top-up amount is 500 FCFA.
wallet.topUpModalSub: You'll be redirected to Fedapay for payment. The wallet is credited on confirmation.

notifications.subtitle: All notifications from your Air Mess activity.
notifications.emptyBody: You'll be notified at each step of your deliveries and wallet activity.
notifications.enableDesktopHint: Get alerts directly on your desktop

profile.subtitle: Update your contact information and password.
profile.subtitleAccount: Details of your Air Mess account.
profile.navStyleHint: Choose how you want to navigate Air Mess.
profile.navHorizontalDesc: Classic. The menu stays visible at the top of the screen.
profile.navFabDesc: Minimal. A movable dot opens the nav as a semicircle.

dev.subtitle: Use Air Mess from your own site: your e-commerce creates an order, the delivery runs on our side. Pick a plan, generate a key, fire your first request.
dev.emptyBody: Create an app to get a key, choose your plan (15, 100 or 500 requests/month) and launch deliveries from your own back-office.
dev.createAppSub: A name to identify it, an optional description, and the API plan to consume.
dev.appDescPlaceholder: What will this app be used for?
dev.expiredBody: The app is suspended. Renew to resume requests.
dev.keysSubtitle: Each key has the same ability. The plain value only appears at creation.
dev.keyCopyBody: Copy the {{label}} immediately. It will never be shown again. If you lose it, regenerate and update your client.
dev.webhookSubtitle: We notify your HTTPS endpoint at each step (created, assigned, picked up, delivered, cancelled, failed). Verify the signature with HMAC-SHA256(secret, body) received in X-AirMess-Signature.
dev.deleteAppBody: All its keys will be revoked immediately. Existing deliveries are unaffected. Permanent action.
dev.copyManualFallback: Copy failed. Select the text manually.
dev.webhookEventStages: We notify your HTTPS endpoint at every step (created, assigned, picked up, delivered, cancelled, failed).

billing.successBody: Your wallet has been credited. You can close this tab.
billing.pendingBody: Waiting for bank confirmation. You can close this tab; your wallet will be credited automatically.
billing.failedBody: No debit was made. Try again from your wallet.
billing.successReceivedBody: Your payment has been confirmed. If it was a top-up, your wallet will be credited in a few seconds; if it was a delivery, it was created automatically.
billing.canceledBody: You cancelled the payment. No amount was charged. You can try again whenever you want.
billing.processingBody: We are waiting for Fedapay confirmation. You will get a notification as soon as your payment is validated.

tracking.title: Delivery tracking
tracking.notFoundBody: This tracking link is invalid or has expired.
tracking.invalidLinkBody: This tracking link does not exist or has expired.
tracking.deliveryCodeHintLine1: Give this code to the courier on arrival
tracking.deliveryCodeHintLine2: to confirm you received the package.

status.driver_to_pickup: The courier is going to pick up your package
status.at_pickup: The courier is on site for pickup
status.picked_up: Your package is on the way

driverRegister.title: Become a courier.
driverRegister.subtitle: Join the Air Mess network and earn money by delivering.
driverRegister.successBody: An admin will validate your file within 24-48h. Download the courier app to be ready.
driverRegister.cniLicenseRequired: ID card and driver's licence are required.
driverRegister.sideSubtext: Join the Air Mess courier network and start accepting deliveries as soon as your account is activated.
driverRegister.benefit1Body: Work whenever you want. Pause or go offline with a tap.
driverRegister.benefit2Body: See what you earn on each delivery before you accept it. No payment surprises.
driverRegister.benefit3Body: Your earnings are paid to your Mobile Money every week. Withdraw on demand.
driverRegister.formSubtitle: Fill in this form — our team reviews your documents within 48h.
driverRegister.sectionAccountDesc: Your login credentials for the courier app.
driverRegister.sectionEquipmentDesc: Helps match you with specific deliveries (restaurant, chilled goods…).
driverRegister.sectionEmergencyDesc: Person to notify in case of accident or incident during a delivery.
driverRegister.sectionDocumentsDesc: ID card and driver's licence are required. Profile photo optional.
driverRegister.sectionDocumentsDescNoLicense: ID card is required. Profile photo optional.

success.cardBody: Your information and documents are being reviewed by our team.
success.nextStepBodyMid: as soon as your account is activated. You will then be able to sign in to
success.meanwhileBody: Download the courier app to be ready as soon as you are activated:

dashboard.subtitle: Live key figures for Air Mess activity.

courses.title: Deliveries supervision
courses.subtitle: All active and past deliveries, filterable by status.
courses.reassignBody: Pick a courier to reassign this delivery. The former courier will be notified.
courses.reassignSubtitle: Select the new courier and provide a reason.
courses.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. courier broke down, no response
courses.pickupFromPreviousLabel: Package is with the previous courier
courses.pickupFromPreviousHelp: Check this if the package is already in the courier's hands (breakdown/accident post-pickup). The new courier will pick it up at their current GPS location instead of the merchant.

marchants.title: Merchants
marchants.subtitle: All merchant accounts. Filter by validation status.
marchants.pageSubtitle: Validation and monitoring of pro accounts

detail.confirmDeleteBody: This action is irreversible. All data will be lost.
detail.dangerZoneBody: Deletion is permanent. It's impossible if the merchant already has deliveries — prefer suspension.
detail.confirmValidateBody: The merchant will immediately be able to create deliveries.
detail.confirmReactivateBody: They will be able to log in and create deliveries again.
detail.confirmSuspendBody: The account will be disabled. The merchant will be logged out immediately and can no longer create deliveries.
detail.confirmRejectBody: Registration will be marked as rejected. The merchant will be logged out.
detail.confirmDeleteBodyLong: This action is irreversible. The account and all its data will be deleted.
detail.suspendIndividualBody: Account access will be cut immediately (tokens revoked).

individuals.title: Individuals
individuals.subtitle: All individual accounts. Filter by status.
individuals.pageSubtitle: Individual accounts and their quota usage

drivers.title: Couriers
drivers.subtitle: All couriers on the network. Validation, activation, management.
drivers.toggleTitleBusy: Courier on a delivery — reassign the delivery before deactivating
drivers.confirmDeactivate: Deactivate {{name}}'s account? They will be logged out.
drivers.validationPendingBody: This courier is waiting for document verification (ID card + licence). Check them below before activating the account.
drivers.docOpenInNewTab: Documents open in a new tab (allow pop-ups for this site).

incidents.title: Incidents
incidents.subtitle: Field reports from couriers.
incidents.subtitleAdmin: Courier and customer reports to handle
incidents.notePlaceholder: e.g. called the courier, delivery finally completed at 2:12 pm

apiApps.title: Developer apps
apiApps.subtitle: All API apps created by merchants and individuals.
apiApps.subtitleAdmin: Third-party apps allowed to create deliveries via the API
apiApps.searchPlaceholder: App name, owner email or phone…
apiApps.globalSearchNotice: Global search — the {{filter}} filter is ignored.
apiApps.confirmSuspendBody: Future API requests from this app will be rejected (403). Keys are kept, so you can reactivate later without regenerating them.

withdraws.title: Withdrawal requests
withdraws.subtitle: Process courier deposit-withdrawal requests.
withdraws.subtitleList: Click a row to open the review form.
withdraws.balanceShortWarning: The current balance ({{balance}}) is below the requested amount. Approval will fail. Please review.
withdraws.payoutInFlightBodyPart2: ). Waiting for the confirmation webhook. No action required — the record will be completed automatically.
withdraws.payoutRetryHint: or use the “Mark as transferred” button below to do it manually.
withdraws.payoutManualIntro: The courier's wallet has been debited.
withdraws.payoutManualMomoIntro: The FedaPay payout was not started (ineligible number or manual attempt expected). Send the transfer to
withdraws.approveConfirm:
Confirm approval of the {{amount}} withdrawal?

The wallet will be debited immediately. You must then send the actual transfer via {{method}}.
withdraws.rejectReasonHint: The courier will be notified with this reason. No debit will be made.
withdraws.rejectPlaceholder: e.g. invalid MoMo account, suspected fraud…
withdraws.payoutReferenceHintMomo: Enter the reference returned by MoMo (transaction number, unique identifier). The courier will be notified.
withdraws.payoutReferenceHintBank: Enter the reference returned by the bank (transaction number, unique identifier). The courier will be notified.
withdraws.driverInCourseWarningPart2: ). Approval will be refused until the delivery is completed.

reconciliation.title: Financial reconciliation
reconciliation.subtitle: Consolidated financial view. CSV export available.
reconciliation.subtitleFull: Financial dashboard — money in circulation, flows, platform margin, anomalies.
reconciliation.dormantDriversTitle: Dormant drivers (balance > 5k, no tx for 60 days)
reconciliation.driftDriversDesc: Signals a serious bug (direct DB mutation bypassing the service). Investigate urgently.

settings.title: Global settings
settings.subtitle: System configuration accessible to the super-admin only.
settings.groupPricingDesc: Rates, commissions and prices applied to deliveries.
settings.groupConflictsDesc: Percentages applied by ops when resolving problematic courses (no-show, lost/damaged package, return to merchant).
settings.plansSectionDesc: Monthly price and quota included in each plan.
settings.navPrefsDesc: Local choice — saved on this device only.
settings.navBothDesc: Vertical sidebar always visible + draggable radial button. This is the default.
settings.navSidebarDesc: Classic mode: only the vertical bar is shown. Hides the floating button.
settings.navFabDesc: Minimal mode: no sidebar, navigation exclusively via the radial button.
